---
title: "Dynamical Systems"
---

# Python Examples

### 1. [Intro to SIR models and Euler's Method](example_SIR.ipynb)

### 2. [Intro to Markov Chains](markov_chains.ipynb)

### 3. [Intro to MCMC and Inference for State Space Models](MCMC.ipynb)

# R Examples

### 1. [R markdown example file](example_R.Rmd)
